name: Popcorn Turkey Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup butter substitute (e.g., Shed's Spread or Canola Oil), optional
2 teaspoons salt - or salt substitute (Mrs. Dash's)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Stuff the cavity of the turkey until full.
3. Place the turkey in a baking pan and bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit in a pre-heated oven.
4. The turkey is done when it reaches the desired doneness.
